subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet We have adorned with the ornaments of the Pen from before the Ancient Lord, and have sent unto him who hath turned towards the Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح زیناه بطراز القلم من لدن مالک القدم و ارسلناه الی من اقبل الی الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
